description: CompositionWhite sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with buttoned chest placket, hakoba stitch detailing in U shape around the placket with pintucks, lace detailing from the shoulder to the waist, and has a curved hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this ever-popular white kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its stylish front, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
